account.heading: Account
account.displayNameHint: This name is shown to other players. Your Google account name is {name}.

roleAccess.heading: Role & access
roleAccess.wbActive: Worldbuilder access granted — you can create and edit Codex entries.
roleAccess.wbPending: Request pending — a DM or Admin will review it soon.
roleAccess.wbNone: Players can request Worldbuilder access to create and edit Codex entries.

dndBeyond.heading: DnD Beyond Character
dndBeyond.noCharacter: No character linked. Ask an admin to add your DnD Beyond character ID.

notifications.heading: Notifications
notifications.sub: Manage which events send you a notification.
